notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jakob Marsee reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Bo Bichette.

notableEvents.label: Luis Torrens plunked
notableEvents.detail: Luis Torrens hit by pitch. Marcus Semien to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Juan Soto grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Juan Soto hits a grand slam (13) to right center field. Luis Torrens scores. Carson Benge scores. Bo Bichette scores.

notableEvents.label: Otto Lopez plunked
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez hit by pitch. Liam Hicks to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jakob Marsee reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jakob Marsee reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Bo Bichette.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández flies out to right fielder Carson Benge.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Luis Torrens singles on a line drive to left fielder Heriberto Hernández. Marcus Semien to 3rd. Marcus Semien advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by left fielder Heriberto Hernández.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández grounds out, shortstop Vidal Bruján to first baseman Mark Vientos.
